title: Princerrrr1 - 01/06/2026 17:46 EDT
brief: I film my own day-to-day content but need a skilled editor to turn that raw footage into tight, watch-worthy daily-life vlogs. You will receive a folder of clips for each episode (typically 10–20 minutes of usable material) and craft a 6–8-minute finished video that feels personal, upbeat, and story-driven. Your role covers everything post-production: trimming the fluff, weaving in jump-cuts for pace, adding royalty-free music, basic colour correction, light motion graphics for lower-thirds and end screens, plus clean subtitles so viewers can follow along even on mute. No filming is required on your side—just solid, creative editing. I shoot in 4K and prefer delivery in 1080p H.264, along with the project file (Premiere Pro, Final Cut, or DaVinci Resolve all work). Please share a link to at least two vlog edits you’ve completed in a similar style so I can gauge fit. Deliverables for each episode: • One final video, ready for YouTube upload • Captions file (.srt) • Editable project file and any custom graphics used If you thrive on storytelling, clean aesthetics, and quick turnarounds, I’d love to collaborate on an ongoing basis.
